articles.title: Realty stock Man Infraconstruction jumps 7% after acquiring South Mumbai projects worth ₹2,000 crore
articles.summary: Realty stock Man Infraconstruction rose as much as 7% on Wednesday, 29 April. Here is what's behind the rally, along with share price trend.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Stock market today: Nifty 50, Sensex end higher but off day’s highs on profit booking; FMCG stocks shine
articles.summary: On April 29, the Indian stock market ended positively but retreated from highs as investors took profits. The Nifty 50 closed at 24,164, up 0.70%, while the Sensex gained 0.82% to finish at 77,520, reflecting mixed trends in broader markets.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Adani Power Q4 Results 2026: Net profit rises 64% to ₹4,271.40 crore; revenue flat
articles.summary: Adani Power reported a consolidated net profit increase of over 64% to ₹4,271.40 crore for Q4FY26, compared to ₹2,599.23 crore last year. However, revenue from operations showed a slight decrease at ₹14,223.09 crore against ₹14,237.40 crore from the previous March quarter.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Vedanta Q4 results 2026: Best-ever PAT surges 89% YoY; revenue jumps 29%
articles.summary: Vedanta Q4 results 2026: The company witnessed record-best PAT of ₹9,352 crore for Q4FY26, jumping 89% year-on-year (YoY) and 20% QoQ. Quarterly revenue at ₹51,524 crore was also the best-ever, rising 29% YoY and 12% QoQ.
articles.label: NEUTRAL

articles.title: Gold rate today: Can precious metal reach $5,000 per ounce anytime soon?
articles.summary: Gold prices have fallen over 16% since the beginning of US-Iran war. Here's what experts believe on gold prices near-term outlook.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: 350% rally in five years! Multibagger small-cap stock hits upper circuit after promoters plan to raise stake
articles.summary: AVI Polymers' stock surged to ₹19.02 after promoters announced plans to increase their stake by 5% following a significant financial turnaround, including a 4,854x revenue increase and a debt-free status, positioning the company for long-term growth.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Indian Bank Q4 Results: Net profit rises 5% YoY to ₹3,103 crore, asset quality improves; declares ₹18.25 dividend
articles.summary: Indian Bank reported a net profit of ₹3,103 crore for the March quarter, a 5% increase from the previous year. Net interest income surged 11.28% to ₹7,110 crore compared to ₹6,389 crore last year.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Bajel Projects shares jump 11% after bagging ₹400 crore transmission orders in MENA region
articles.summary: Bajel Projects shares jumped 11% after winning EPC contracts for 500 kV transmission lines in the MENA region, totaling ₹400 crore. The project aims to strengthen the power infrastructure and is expected to be completed within 11 months.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Markets Downplay War’s Impact on Petrochemicals, Pipeline CEO Says
articles.summary: Investors are misjudging how much Strait of Hormuz closures could impact global flows of petrochemicals, said Enterprise Products Partners LP Chief Executive Officer Jim Teague, adding to a chorus of industry voices warning about lingering disruptions from the Iran war.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: Nifty 50 begins May series with cautious undertone; FII long ratio slips
articles.summary: Nifty’s April rollover came in at 71.4%, lower than the previous expiry’s 77.8% and slightly below its three- and six-month averages of 72.3%. This indicates a relatively subdued appetite among traders to carry forward aggressive bets into the new series.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: Embassy Office’s FY27 growth targets look doable unless GCC demand falters
articles.summary: Embassy sees AI-related risk to be benign for office assets and expects portfolio occupancy to increase to 92-93% in FY27
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Expert view: Below 24,300, Nifty 50 could signal short-term weakness, says Rohit Srivastava of Indiacharts
articles.summary: Expert view: Rohit Srivastava, the founder and market strategist at Indiacharts.com, believes the market may have begun a move that could eventually take it back to record levels. He, however, added that a fall below 24,300 could signals short term weakness.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: HUL stock in 2026: Can FMCG’s biggest name deliver the next leg of growth?
articles.summary: FMCG stocks are back in favour as investors rotate from IT and bet on demand stability. With the Nifty FMCG index up 11% in April alone, attention turns to Hindustan Unilever—where volume growth, margins, and rural demand will decide whether the rally has more room to run.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: ₹2 lakh wiped from peak! Silver price in India loses all gains of 2026 YTD - Should you still buy the white metal?
articles.summary: After a sharp rally, silver prices have fallen below 2025 levels due to macroeconomic factors and profit booking. The selloff was intensified by a strong dollar and geopolitical tensions. Long-term demand and supply constraints suggest a potential recovery despite near-term pressures.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Why are investors ignoring Maruti’s profit dip in Q4?
articles.summary: A 7% slide in net profit wasn’t enough to stop the stock from rallying 5% on Wednesday. As the carmaker bets on a massive capacity expansion and an export surge, we look at why the market is looking past the headline numbers to find a potential entry point.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Indian Overseas Bank Q4 results: Net profit rises 43% YoY to ₹1,505 crore, NII up 11%
articles.summary: Indian Overseas Bank Q4 results: Net profit rises 43% YoY to ₹1,505 crore, NII up 11%
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Indian stock market: Nifty 50 set to snap its 4-month losing streak in April, but don't expect a sustained rally ahead
articles.summary: The Indian stock market shows signs of recovery, with Nifty 50 up over 8% in April, but experts warn that external factors, particularly elevated crude oil prices and geopolitical tensions, could hinder sustained growth.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: US Fed meeting outcome today: Here's time, expectations, when & where to watch Jerome Powell's speech
articles.summary: US Federal Reserve began their two-day meeting on April 28. The central bank will announce the policy outcome on Wednesday, 29 April. Here's all the details, along with market expectations.
articles.label: NEUTRAL

articles.title: Vodafone Idea, Eternal, JP Power, Bandhan Bank, Suzlon among the most traded stocks today, 29 April 2026
articles.summary: Vodafone Idea, Eternal, Jaiprakash Power Ventures (JP Power), Bandhan Bank, Suzlon Energy, and YES Bank were the most active stocks, or most traded stocks in terms of volume, on the NSE.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: AI stock Blue Cloud jumps after this MoU update. Check details
articles.summary: Blue Cloud Softech share price has gained over 2% in one month and rallied 8% in three months. The smallcap stock has plunged 32% in six months, while it has gained 15% in one year. Blue Cloud Softech shares have declined 52% in three years.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Mint Explainer: How Sebi’s proposed net worth rules could reshape stockbrokers’ business
articles.summary: Sebi has proposed changes to the current method of calculating variable net worth in a stockbroker's business. How will the changes impact stockbrokers and investors?
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Small-cap stock under ₹50 MIC Electronics jumps 10% following stock market rally
articles.summary: MIC Electronics shares rose nearly 9% on April 29, driven by strong domestic equities. The company reported a Q4 net loss of ₹18.35 crore, largely due to a one-time tax adjustment, despite a 13.3% revenue increase and improved operational performance.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Stock markets can deliver years of zero returns, explains DSP Mutual Fund MD, CEO: Key takeaways for investors
articles.summary: Kalpen Parekh, MD and CEO at DSP Mutual Fund, shared an important insight in his post on social media platform X (formerly Twitter) that all markets can have long periods of zero returns.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Vedanta demerger: Last day to buy shares today for eligibility ahead of demerger record date
articles.summary: Vedanta is also nearing its demerger record date of 1 May 2026. As there is a stock market holiday on May 1, Vedanta shares will trade ex-demerger on April 30, Thursday. Therefore, today is the last day to buy Vedanta shares to avail the demerger benefits, on account of the T+1 settlement cycle.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Mint Explainer | Vedanta F&O contracts expire today ahead of demerger. What happens next?
articles.summary: Vedanta Ltd is restructuring into five independent companies. This move, aimed at value unlocking, will disrupt the derivatives market temporarily, with all futures and options contracts expiring on April 29.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Deutsche Bank’s DWS Sees Net Inflows Slow as War Rattles Markets
articles.summary: DWS Group saw a slowdown in net inflows in the first quarter as volatility sparked by the Iran war rippled across global markets.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: Bajaj Finance Q4 Results 2026 LIVE: Bajaj Finance share price ends 1% higher ahead of earnings today. What to expect?
articles.summary: Bajaj Finance Q4 Results 2026 LIVE: Bajaj Finance is expected to report strong earnings growth during the fourth quarter of FY26, led by a robust rise in net profit along with steady margins. Commentary on asset quality trends and credit costs, and progress on LRS and growth guidance would be eyed.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Gold, silver prices today: Check retail rates of 24K, 22K gold, 999 silver on 29 April in Delhi, Mumbai, Pune, others
articles.summary: Gold and silver prices on 29 April remained largely flat amid global uncertainty and the US Federal Reserve policy outlook. Check the latest 24K and 22K gold rates and 999 silver prices across major Indian cities like Delhi, Mumbai, Chennai, Ahmedabad and Hyderabad.
articles.label: NEUTRAL

articles.title: Vedanta Q4 Results 2026 LIVE: Net Profit jumps 89% to ₹9,352 crore, revenue hits record high
articles.summary: Vedanta Q4 Results 2026 LIVE: Vedanta Ltd reported a strong performance for the January–March quarter, with consolidated net profit surging over 88.5% year-on-year to ₹9,352 crore, surpassing Street expectations. Revenue from operations also saw a sharp uptick,
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Infosys slips out of top 10 most valuable firms as nearly ₹2 lakh crore market cap wiped out this year
articles.summary: Infosys share price has declined nearly 29% on a year-to-date (YTD) basis. At the end of 2025, Infosys commanded a market capitalisation of over ₹6.8 lakh crore. The decline in Infosys shares mirrors the broader sell-off in the Indian IT sector.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Bandhan Bank share price soars 14% to its 52-week high post Q4 earnings; brokerages bullish on the private lender
articles.summary: Bandhan Bank's shares reached a 52-week high after reporting a net profit of ₹534.14 crore for Q4FY26, up 68% YoY. While margins declined, improving asset quality and a significant drop in provisions boosted profitability.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: GRSE share price jumps 15% after strong Q4 results 2026. Do you own?
articles.summary: Garden Reach Shipbuilders & Engineers (GRSE) share price skyrocketed 15% on Wednesday, 29 April, after posting strong financial results for the quarter ending on March 31, 2026.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Crude oil prices extend gains for 8th day, brent crude remains above $110/bbl. Where are prices headed?
articles.summary: MCX crude oil prices fell 0.60% to ₹9,426 per barrel on Wednesday, 29 April. Here's what experts say on near-term outlook of crude oil prices.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: Stock market today: Gift Nifty signals flat opening; US Fed meet, India VIX to oil, gold rates — 8 stocks to buy or sell
articles.summary: Stock market today, 29 April 2026: Experts recommend these eight stocks to buy today — Aditya Birla Real Estate, MCX, GRSE, HAL, IRFC, MOIL, OIL, and Mishra Dhatu
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Eternal share price jumps over 4% after Q4 results. Should you buy, sell or hold the Zomato parent’s stock?
articles.summary: Eternal share price has gained 11% in one month, but the stock has fallen 9% on a year-to-date (YTD) basis. The stock has rallied 12% in one year and has surged 34% over the past two years.
articles.label: NEUTRAL

articles.title: China stays on top, India slips 3 spots: How the West Asia war changed EM ranks
articles.summary: With crude above $100 and capital flows turning volatile, the West Asia shock is now playing out through financial channels. Emerging market rankings are shifting, driven by external resilience rather than growth.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: Will Iran war shake India's flagship welfare schemes? The finance ministry wants to find out
articles.summary: Schemes under review include the Pradhan Mantri Vishwakarma Yojana; Mudra Yojana; Svanidhi Yojana; and Surya Ghar Muft Bijli Yojana. The review will check whether external shocks could affect the implementation of these schemes.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: Govt mulls customs duty relief on cotton import to support textile industry
articles.summary: Raw cotton imports into India attract a 5% basic customs duty. The government had exempted the commodity from import duty from 19 August to 30 September 2025. This was later extended till 31 December 2025.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: India's industrial output growth eases to five-month low of 4.1% in March
articles.summary: The data follows the reading in core sector which showed a contraction by 0.4% in March, marking its lowest level in 19 months, compared with a revised 2.8% growth in February and 4.5% expansion in March 2025
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: India's fertilizer subsidy may jump 20% as Hormuz crisis spikes prices
articles.summary: India's fertilizer subsidy stood at ₹1.86 trillion in the 2025-26 fiscal year (FY26), and was estimated at ₹1.71 trillion in the budget for the ongoing financial year. Mint reported on 2 March that India's fertilizer subsidy will go up amid the West Asian conflict.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: India seals FTA with New Zealand, gets $20 bn investment pledge, duty-free access
articles.summary: The agreement comes at a time of evolving global and regional dynamics, with New Zealand viewing India as a key partner in promoting regional stability, economic resilience and shared prosperity.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: India-New Zealand FTA: Temporary Employment Entry offers 5,000 work visas for skilled Indians — check key features
articles.summary: The TEE pathway caps the number of visas at 5,000 at any time, allowing stays of up to 3 years. It targets both traditional Indian expertise—such as yoga instructors, AYUSH practitioners, and chefs—and high-demand fields like IT, healthcare, engineering, and education.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Mapping the fallout: Which Indian sectors face risks from the West Asia war?
articles.summary: The West Asia war has triggered an energy crisis, hitting sectors like fertilizers and airlines. With the Strait of Hormuz disrupted, rising costs and supply shortages could directly or indirectly impact nearly 30 sectors.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: Oil jumps over 1% as US-Iran talks stall, Hormuz blockade deepens crisis
articles.summary: Crude prices rose over 1% after US-Iran talks stalled and Hormuz tensions deepened, raising fears of supply disruptions and sharper inventory draws.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: India to overhaul firefighting infra, rejig its vehicles and equipment
articles.summary: The government is seeking to address critical gaps in fire safety infrastructure, amid acute shortages of fire stations, equipment and personnel, raising concerns over response readiness as urban fire risks rise.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: The FTA cautionary tale: What India-Korea trade warns us about new global deals
articles.summary: In their bilateral trade pact, South Korea has gained significantly more than India. As it enters more such pacts, India would do well to review where it fell short with South Korea and why.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Kedaara picks up 5% in Axis Finance for Rs750 crore, sets benchmark for IPO-headed NBFC
articles.summary: Axis Finance has raised Rs750 crore from Kedaara Capital for a 5.08% stake, marking its first external funding. This capital boost strengthens its financial base as it jostles in India's extremely competitive credit market—preparing for a future IPO under regulatory requirements.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: The week in charts: Fertilizer output, IT earnings, health spending survey
articles.summary: In this weekly Plain Facts compilation, we present to you data-based insights, with easy-to-read charts, to help you delve deeper into the stories reported by Mint in the week gone by.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Centre raises wheat procurement target to 34.5 million tonnes amid erratic weather
articles.summary: The government has raised procurement target even as unseasonal rains raise output concerns.
articles.label: NEUTRAL

articles.title: Oil prices up 1% amid continued stalemate on US-Iran talks, closure of Strait of Hormuz
articles.summary: Crude prices climbed over 1% as supply disruption in the Strait of Hormuz and stalled US-Iran talks kept markets on edge, raising concerns over India’s import bill and fuel marketing losses.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: RBI sees growth, inflation risks from escalating US-Iran war
articles.summary: Further escalation, a longer duration and a wider spread of the war are key risks to the global outlook, says RBI in its April Bulletin
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: Power demand spikes even before peak summer, seen at record high this year
articles.summary: India’s power demand has surged to nearly 240 GW amid an early, intense heatwave, nearing last year’s peak. With temperatures set to stay above normal, demand could hit record highs, testing grid capacity despite rising supply and preparedness by power utilities.
articles.label: NEUTRAL

articles.title: Indian private sector output growth accelerates in April as manufacturing grows faster: HSBC Flash India PMI
articles.summary: April saw a rebound in India's private sector growth. The HSBC Flash PMI revealed stronger manufacturing output and job creation, although inflation pressures remained high, with firms raising selling prices in response.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Mint Explainer | Is India's wheat export push a good idea?
articles.summary: India has reopened wheat exports amid a record surplus to ease excess supply and support farm prices. By offloading stocks, it aims to boost farmer incomes without stoking inflation, as ample buffer reserves and policy flexibility help keep domestic supply stable.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Oil prices up amid stalemate over next round of peace talks, continued blockade of Strait of Hormuz
articles.summary: Oil prices ticked higher as the US–Iran standoff over the Strait of Hormuz deepened, with naval blockades continuing despite ceasefire claims, raising supply and inflation risks for India.
articles.label: NEUTRAL

articles.title: Caution at MPC as war muddies view
articles.summary: The minutes showed that while members expect inflation to rise further, it would be primarily driven by supply shocks, something that monetary policy has limited control over.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: UK inflation jumps to 3.3% in March as Iran war sends fuel prices to highest rise since Ukraine invasion
articles.summary: UK inflation rose to 3.3% in March due to surging energy costs from the Iran war. Motor fuel prices jumped 8.7%, while services inflation unexpectedly increased to 4.5%. This inflation outlook may impact interest rates, with economists now expecting a prolonged pause in rate hikes.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: India likely to grow 7% in FY27 on domestic demand, investments; inflation to remain in range: EAC-PM chairman Dev
articles.summary: The economy’s resilience in the face of headwinds generated by the West Asia war could be demonstrated by the narrowing of India’s trade deficit to $20.67 billion in March, said S. Mahendra Dev, chairman of the Economic Advisory Council to PM.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: Oil prices trade lower as Trump announces ceasefire extension; naval blockade of Iran curbs losses
articles.summary: Global oil prices eased after the US extended its ceasefire with Iran, but a continuing naval blockade and the prolonged closure of the Strait of Hormuz kept supply concerns—and volatility—firmly in play.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: India’s GDP growth to slow to 6.4% in FY27 amid geopolitical headwinds: UN report
articles.summary: The report, by the United Nations Economic and Social Commission for Asia and the Pacific, projected that India’s GDP growth would pick up moderately to 6.6% in FY28, driven by domestic demand and services.
articles.label: BULLISH
